title: [DO NOT MERGE] Default ostree stub
body: This PR is only to test the integration of the changes of [PR 587 of c/image](https://github.com/containers/image/pull/587).

comments.body: just to make it sure, by default skopeo will still need the "ostree:" backend as it is used by the atomic CLI

>  just to make it sure, by default skopeo will still need the "ostree:" backend as it is used by the atomic CLI

I WANT to keep that backend on Skopeo, so I wouldn't try on purpose to provide a default configuration removing it from Skopeo.

I'm trying to make sure that I'm not introducing these kind of undesired side-effects with https://github.com/containers/image/pull/587.
